calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Bruce Chan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Brian P. Berson, Esq. present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant paul Villicana Sr. as follows:
Damages $32,000.47
Prejudgment Interest $3,225.40
Costs $390.00, for a total of $35,615.87
Judgment signed in open court.
